results.name: Ukraine
results.key_finding: Russia broke Ukraine-declared unilateral ceasefire within hours of midnight start with 108 combat drones + 3 missiles, killing 1 civilian in Sumy. Per methodology v1.2 bad-faith-ceasefire rule, violation is inverted signal toward Russia (counterparty), NOT Ukraine. Sub-threshold delta. May 9-10 emergency re-queue maintained.

results.name: India
results.key_finding: First baseline. May 2025 conflict, Indus Waters abeyance, RSF 157/180 (historic low), HRW dissent suppression — published score reconstructs cleanly to 34.4. Compound evidence is consistent with developing-band placement.

results.name: Pakistan
results.key_finding: First baseline. HRCP 2025 Annual Report (May 5) documents enforced disappearances, military trials, PECA prosecutions; HRW Feb 2026 free-speech submission; Indus Waters dispute as victim-counterparty. Critical-band placement consistent with floor-proximate ACC (1.5) and INT (1.5).

results.name: Sudan
results.key_finding: Floor sustained with new conduct documentation. UN Fact-Finding Mission Feb 2026: El-Fasher genocidal campaign by RSF — 6,000+ killings in 3 days; three Genocide Convention prohibited acts. Floor designation (April 30) reinforced by formal UN genocide finding.

results.name: Argentina
results.key_finding: First baseline. May 1 Plaza de Mayo largest union march of Milei era; Feb 2026 Senate-approved labor reforms (12-hour days); 200K+ formal job losses; pensioner-protester violence; unconstitutional judicial appointments. Sub-threshold downward pressure (-4.6 reconstructed); functional-band sustained with boundary-case approval.

results.name: Italy
results.key_finding: First baseline. Feb 2026 cabinet-approved migration bill: naval blockades, SAR NGO criminalization (50K euro fines), Libya/Tunisia coast guard co-funding. Sub-threshold BND/INT pressure (-3.1 reconstructed); functional-band sustained with boundary-case approval. Albania court rejections sustain residual constitutional check.

results.name: Turkey
results.key_finding: Post-baseline confirm. April 30 first-baseline downgrade (32.8 → 22.5) sustained. RSF 163/180 (down from 159) confirms deterioration trajectory; 13 Q1 2026 detentions; Article 299 persistence. Sub-threshold drift.

results.name: Waymo
results.key_finding: First baseline DOWNGRADE with band-crossing. Compound public-safety failures: child struck near Santa Monica school + NHTSA probe; 19+ school-bus override incidents (Dec 2025 recall); ambulance-blocking (March 2026); crime-scene navigation failures; Philippines remote-operator labor transparency gap surfaced via Senate uproar. Half-step down on all 8 dimensions; functional → developing band crossing.

results.name: Greece
results.key_finding: First baseline DOWNGRADE with band-crossing. 594+ pushbacks affecting 17,000+ in 2024-2025; Feb 3 Coast Guard collision deaths (15); Feb 5 SAR criminalization; Tommy Olsen EAW; Pylos indictment of 17 officers (residual accountability signal). EMP/ACT/BND/ACC/INT half-steps down; functional → developing crossing.

results.name: Colombia
results.key_finding: First baseline. UN OHCHR March 2026 urgent action; ~100 HRDs/year killed for a decade; Miguel Uribe Turbay killing; 64K+ displaced; explosive-device civilian casualties +145%. Developing-band placement consistent with cumulative HRW/OHCHR base.

results.name: Palantir AI
results.key_finding: Floor sustained with structural-change new conduct documentation. Pentagon March 2026 Maven program-of-record designation; May 1 classified-cohort agreements; Karp manifesto framing AI weapons proliferation as deterrence. Maven elevation is most consequential structural-integration event of cycle.

results.name: Amazon AWS AI
results.key_finding: First baseline. March 31 NLRB settlement (1,300 facilities); April 3 first Teamsters bargaining order (Staten Island); concurrent constitutional challenge to NLRB; Pentagon May 1 classified cohort. Compliance-track positive + structural-challenge negative net to sub-threshold drift. Math-hygiene flag: published 33.9 vs reconstructed 35.9.

results.name: Ghost Robotics
results.key_finding: First baseline NEW FLOOR DESIGNATION. Cedra April 13 ethics analysis: explicit refusal to restrict military payload use ('we don't know what they do with them'); refusal to sign 2022 anti-weaponization pledge; sniper-quadruped border deployment; no model/system card. Composite 9.4 → 0; all 8 dimensions to floor (1).

results.name: Ecuador
results.key_finding: First baseline. Freedom House 2026: Fénix plan arbitrary arrests, extrajudicial killings, detainee torture; Global Initiative carceral-capture report; among most violent LAm countries. Sub-threshold downward pressure (-4.6 reconstructed); developing-band sustained with boundary-case approval.

headline_findings: NEW FLOOR DESIGNATION: Ghost Robotics moved to floor (composite 0) — first robotics-labs entity floor designation since Apr 30 cycle. Explicit refusal to restrict military payload use, sniper-quadruped border deployment, refusal to sign anti-weaponization pledge, and absence of model/system card together cross floor threshold.

BAND CROSSINGS: Waymo (functional → developing, -12.5) and Greece (functional → developing, -7.8) both first-baseline downgrades crossing band boundaries. Waymo's school-bus override pattern + Philippines remote-operator transparency failure + emergency-response navigation failures aggregate to 12.5-point material change. Greece's 594+ pushbacks + Feb 3 Coast Guard fatalities + Feb 5 SAR criminalization aggregate to 7.8-point material change.

FLOOR CLUSTER STABILITY: Sudan and Palantir AI floors confirmed with new conduct documentation. Sudan: UN Feb 2026 El-Fasher genocidal-campaign finding adds formal Genocide Convention framing to existing floor. Palantir: Maven program-of-record designation deepens structural integration; Karp manifesto provides primary-source autonomous-weapons posture.

FIRST BASELINES: 11 of 14 entities are first-agent baselines. India (34.4 confirm), Pakistan (20.3 confirm), Sudan (0 floor sustain), Argentina (48.4 confirm + boundary), Italy (50.0 confirm + boundary), Waymo (35.9 downgrade + band crossing), Greece (39.1 downgrade + band crossing), Colombia (35.9 confirm), Amazon AWS AI (33.9 confirm + math-hygiene flag), Ghost Robotics (0 new floor), Ecuador (35.9 confirm + boundary).

BAD-FAITH-CEASEFIRE INVERSION: Ukraine ceasefire violation by Russia within hours of midnight start applied per methodology v1.2 — inverted signal toward Russia (counterparty), NOT Ukraine. Ukraine sustains 50.0 functional. May 9-10 emergency re-queue retained.
MATH-HYGIENE: Amazon AWS AI flagged (+2.0 reconstructed vs published). One additional entity for the open math-hygiene cluster; data-team review only, no composite change proposed in evidence cycle.
HOLDS RESPECTED: anthropic (May 15 / May 19), openai (May 21 verdict), microsoft (Nadella testimony), hungary (May 9 swearing-in). All four holds preserved in queue per pipeline-context discipline.
